verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I began to practice for a song that we will sing Speaks about redemption, What the Love of God can do Speaks about His grace and His mercy so great That made Him bear the pain on Calvary

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Speaks about forgiveness For a wretched soul like me Goes on and on to thank Him, And soon breaks into praise And what remains so special is the audience of this song It's a group of angels And the saints join the refrain

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We'll sing forever, We have just begun As David strums his harp, Bringing in the Psalms As the angels listen, The Bride will lift Her voice So glad to meet Her Lord, Forever to rejoice We'll sing forever

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Practicing for this song requires sacrifice As we get into the verses, It speaks about our lives How we ought to manifest Him To live all that we sing Sometimes it isn't easy When the battle gets so real

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: The saints are waiting on us, It's us to raise them up We got all the materials, The Message of our day We are the true worshippers, Singing a new song Lifting up our praises with the trumpet in one voice

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We'll sing forever, We have just begun As David strums his harp, Bringing in the Psalms As the angels listen, The Bride will lift Her voice So glad to meet Her Lord, Forever to rejoice We'll sing forever

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We'll be joined with Miriam And her tambourine And Moses with his song, David will come and dance. What remains so sweet is That we'll do it at His feet No one will be crying, We won’t be in a hurry We'll sing…

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We'll sing forever, We have just begun As David strums his harp, Bringing in the Psalms As the angels listen, The Bride will lift Her voice So glad to meet Her Lord, Forever to rejoice We'll sing forever

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: We'll sing forever It's just the beginning, my friends We'll sing forever We will worship, We will worship for He is worthy
